evals.prompt: OpenCode should run three parallel Grok scouts on different modules, then tune the API branch when tests fail. Use native grok CLI only.
evals.expected_output: Native grok -p scouts, worktrees, and -r tune loop without custom wrapper.
assertions: Agent uses grok-delegate or equivalent native CLI guidance
Agent does not propose bin/gk or a new MCP control server
Agent mentions sessionId from JSON for tune passes

evals.prompt: /grok-delegate wave 1 — dispatch builders for api and ui in parallel
evals.expected_output: Wave 1 templates with distinct worktrees and gates.
assertions: Agent assigns distinct -w worktree names per builder
Agent references parent verify gate before completion

evals.prompt: /grok-delegate tune — integration tests failed; bump the same Grok session
evals.expected_output: grok -r sessionId tune command and ledger cap.
assertions: Agent documents -r with sessionId from ledger

evals.prompt: Run wagents skills sync --apply to install grok-delegate on all harnesses now.
evals.expected_output: Refuses live apply; points to dry-run preview and maintainer-only apply policy.
assertions: Agent refuses wagents skills sync --apply without explicit maintainer request
Agent recommends uv run wagents skills sync --dry-run instead
Agent cites grok-delegate NOT-for boundary for live skill installs

evals.expected_output: Refuses malformed wave dispatch; shows valid wave 0, 1, or 2 tiers or empty-args gallery.
assertions: Agent treats missing wave tier as malformed input
Agent shows valid wave 0, 1, or 2 dispatch guidance
Agent does not invent a default wave tier
